requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (NTE INEN / CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备的电磁兼容 / 无线电骚扰（NTE INEN / CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備的電磁兼容 / 無線電騷擾（NTE INEN / CISPR 15）

summary.en: Ecuador does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC directive. Electromagnetic compatibility for lighting equipment is addressed through NTE INEN standards adopting the IEC/CISPR base (CISPR 15 — limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment) where referenced by the applicable RTE INEN technical regulation or required by the conformity-assessment scope. Coverage, when in scope, concerns conducted emissions on mains terminals and radiated emissions. Whether an EMC test report must accompany the Certificate of Conformity depends on the specific RTE INEN lighting regulation in force and the conformity-assessment body's scope — this must be confirmed for the specific product, as Ecuador's EMC enforcement for general lighting is less prescriptive than the EU EMC Directive regime.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔不实行欧盟式独立 EMC 指令。照明设备的电磁兼容性通过采用 IEC/CISPR 基础的 NTE INEN 标准处理（CISPR 15——电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），在适用的 RTE INEN 技术法规引用或合格评定范围要求时适用。在涵盖范围内，涉及电源端传导发射及辐射发射。是否须在符合性证书中附带 EMC 检测报告，取决于现行特定 RTE INEN 照明法规及合格评定机构的范围——须就具体产品予以确认，因为厄瓜多尔对通用照明的 EMC 执行不如欧盟 EMC 指令制度严格。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾不實行歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令。照明設備的電磁兼容性通過採用 IEC/CISPR 基礎的 NTE INEN 標準處理（CISPR 15——電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），在適用的 RTE INEN 技術法規引用或合格評定範圍要求時適用。在涵蓋範圍內，涉及電源端傳導發射及輻射發射。是否須在符合性證書中附帶 EMC 檢測報告，取決於現行特定 RTE INEN 照明法規及合格評定機構的範圍——須就具體產品予以確認，因為厄瓜多爾對通用照明的 EMC 執行不如歐盟 EMC 指令制度嚴格。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN standards adopting CISPR 15 — radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (where referenced by the applicable RTE INEN regulation)
RTE INEN lighting technical regulation — scope determines whether an EMC test report is required for the Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires in scope of CCC, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of the CCC EMC assessment, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are designed for the Chinese market and are not automatically recognized for Ecuador's Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。对于 CCC 范围内的灯具，GB 17743 合规为 CCC 电磁兼容评估的组成部分，并在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC 电磁兼容检测报告针对中国市场，不自动被厄瓜多尔符合性证书所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。對於 CCC 範圍內的燈具，GB 17743 合規為 CCC 電磁兼容評估的組成部分，並在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC 電磁兼容檢測報告針對中國市場，不自動被厄瓜多爾符合性證書所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both Ecuador (where it adopts CISPR 15 via NTE INEN) and China (GB 17743) derive emission limits from CISPR 15, so the technical content is largely harmonized. The key differences are regulatory rather than technical: (1) Ecuador has no EU-style horizontal EMC directive — whether an EMC emissions report is mandatory depends on the specific RTE INEN lighting regulation and the conformity-assessment body's scope, so the requirement is more variable and must be confirmed per product; (2) where EMC evidence is required, it forms part of the Certificate of Conformity dossier rather than a separate self-declared EU EMC DoC; (3) Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically recognized — confirm with the Ecuadorian conformity-assessment body whether ILAC-recognized CNAS reports to CISPR 15 are accepted. The 60 Hz mains (vs China's 50 Hz) can shift conducted-emission and harmonic behaviour, so 50 Hz-only test data should be reviewed for 60 Hz validity.
gap.zh: 厄瓜多尔（在通过 NTE INEN 采用 CISPR 15 时）与中国（GB 17743）的发射限值均源自 CISPR 15，技术内容基本协调。主要差异在监管而非技术：（1）厄瓜多尔无欧盟式横向 EMC 指令——是否强制要求 EMC 发射报告取决于具体 RTE INEN 照明法规及合格评定机构范围，因此要求更具可变性，须逐产品确认；（2）在要求 EMC 证据时，其属于符合性证书档案的一部分，而非独立自我声明的欧盟 EMC DoC；（3）中国 CCC 电磁兼容报告不自动被认可——须与厄瓜多尔合格评定机构确认是否接受 ILAC 认可的 CNAS 按 CISPR 15 出具的报告。60 Hz 电源（相对中国 50 Hz）可能改变传导发射及谐波行为，故仅 50 Hz 的检测数据应就 60 Hz 有效性予以复核。
gap.zht: 厄瓜多爾（在通過 NTE INEN 採用 CISPR 15 時）與中國（GB 17743）的發射限值均源自 CISPR 15，技術內容基本協調。主要差異在監管而非技術：（1）厄瓜多爾無歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令——是否強制要求 EMC 發射報告取決於具體 RTE INEN 照明法規及合格評定機構範圍，因此要求更具可變性，須逐產品確認；（2）在要求 EMC 證據時，其屬於符合性證書檔案的一部分，而非獨立自我聲明的歐盟 EMC DoC；（3）中國 CCC 電磁兼容報告不自動被認可——須與厄瓜多爾合格評定機構確認是否接受 ILAC 認可的 CNAS 按 CISPR 15 出具的報告。60 Hz 電源（相對中國 50 Hz）可能改變傳導發射及諧波行為，故僅 50 Hz 的檢測數據應就 60 Hz 有效性予以複核。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Ecuador has no standalone EMC directive; an EMC emissions report (NTE INEN / CISPR 15) is required only where the applicable RTE INEN lighting regulation or conformity-assessment scope calls for it. Confirm per product.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (where in CCC scope) — GB 17743 compliance required as part of CCC EMC assessment for in-scope luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador does not have an EU-style horizontal EMC directive; EMC emissions evidence for lighting (NTE INEN / CISPR 15) is required only where the applicable RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment scope calls for it, so this must be confirmed per product. The CISPR 15 technical base is shared with China's GB 17743, but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically recognized, and 50 Hz-only test data should be reviewed for validity on Ecuador's 60 Hz grid. Where required, EMC evidence forms part of the Certificate of Conformity dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔无欧盟式横向 EMC 指令；照明的 EMC 发射证据（NTE INEN / CISPR 15）仅在适用的 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定范围要求时才需要，故须逐产品确认。其 CISPR 15 技术基础与中国 GB 17743 一致，但中国 CCC 电磁兼容报告不自动被认可，且仅 50 Hz 的检测数据应就厄瓜多尔 60 Hz 电网的有效性予以复核。在要求时，EMC 证据属于符合性证书档案的一部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾無歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令；照明的 EMC 發射證據（NTE INEN / CISPR 15）僅在適用的 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定範圍要求時才需要，故須逐產品確認。其 CISPR 15 技術基礎與中國 GB 17743 一致，但中國 CCC 電磁兼容報告不自動被認可，且僅 50 Hz 的檢測數據應就厄瓜多爾 60 Hz 電網的有效性予以複核。在要求時，EMC 證據屬於符合性證書檔案的一部分。

requirement_topic.en: Smart / Wireless Luminaire Radio Approval (ARCOTEL Homologation)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能 / 无线灯具无线电核准（ARCOTEL 型号核准）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能 / 無線燈具無線電核准（ARCOTEL 型號核准）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee dimming, smart-home control) require radio-spectrum approval from ARCOTEL (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones), Ecuador's telecommunications regulator, through its equipment homologation (homologacion) process, in addition to the lighting Certificate of Conformity. ARCOTEL homologation confirms the radio module operates within Ecuador's authorized frequency bands and power limits. This is a separate approval from the INEN lighting conformity route and must be obtained before the smart luminaire can be lawfully imported and marketed. The in-country importer typically manages the ARCOTEL filing.
summary.zh: 具备集成无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 调光、智能家居控制）的 LED 灯具，除照明符合性证书外，还须经厄瓜多尔电信监管机构 ARCOTEL（电信监管与控制局，Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones）的设备型号核准（homologacion）流程取得无线电频谱核准。ARCOTEL 型号核准确认无线模块在厄瓜多尔授权频段及功率限值内运行。这是独立于 INEN 照明符合性路径的核准，须在智能灯具合法进口及上市前取得。ARCOTEL 申报通常由当地进口商办理。
summary.zht: 具備集成無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 調光、智能家居控制）的 LED 燈具，除照明符合性證書外，還須經厄瓜多爾電信監管機構 ARCOTEL（電信監管與控制局，Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones）的設備型號核准（homologacion）流程取得無線電頻譜核准。ARCOTEL 型號核准確認無線模組在厄瓜多爾授權頻段及功率限值內運行。這是獨立於 INEN 照明符合性路徑的核准，須在智能燈具合法進口及上市前取得。ARCOTEL 申報通常由當地進口商辦理。

standards_or_laws: ARCOTEL equipment homologation (homologacion) — radio-spectrum approval for wireless-enabled devices (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones, Ecuador)
Certificate of Conformity (INEN lighting route) — required in addition to ARCOTEL approval for the luminaire itself

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC for the luminaire. SRRC approval confirms operation within China's allocated frequency bands and power limits. SRRC type approval is China-specific and is not recognized by ARCOTEL — a separate Ecuadorian homologation is required, and the authorized bands and power limits may differ between the two jurisdictions.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具除灯具 CCC 外，还须为无线模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。SRRC 核准确认在中国分配的频段及功率限值内运行。SRRC 型号核准为中国特有，不被 ARCOTEL 认可——须另行取得厄瓜多尔型号核准，且两个司法辖区的授权频段及功率限值可能不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具除燈具 CCC 外，還須為無線模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。SRRC 核准確認在中國分配的頻段及功率限值內運行。SRRC 型號核准為中國特有，不被 ARCOTEL 認可——須另行取得厄瓜多爾型號核准，且兩個司法轄區的授權頻段及功率限值可能不同。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China (State Radio Regulation Committee)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — required for the luminaire in addition to SRRC

gap.en: Both jurisdictions require radio approval for wireless luminaires, but the schemes are independent and non-mutual: China's SRRC approval is not recognized by Ecuador's ARCOTEL. For Ecuador, the manufacturer/importer must (1) confirm the radio module's frequencies and transmit power fall within Ecuador's authorized bands; (2) obtain ARCOTEL homologation for the device; (3) separately obtain the INEN lighting Certificate of Conformity. Differences in authorized bands or maximum power between China and Ecuador may require module re-configuration or re-testing. The ARCOTEL process is typically handled by the in-country importer and must be completed before importation — a smart luminaire cleared only on its lighting conformity, without ARCOTEL approval, would not be lawfully marketable.
gap.zh: 两个司法辖区均要求无线灯具取得无线电核准，但两套方案相互独立且不互认：中国 SRRC 核准不被厄瓜多尔 ARCOTEL 认可。对于厄瓜多尔，制造商 / 进口商须：（1）确认无线模块的频率及发射功率落入厄瓜多尔授权频段；（2）为设备取得 ARCOTEL 型号核准；（3）另行取得 INEN 照明符合性证书。中国与厄瓜多尔授权频段或最大功率的差异可能要求模块重新配置或重新检测。ARCOTEL 流程通常由当地进口商办理，须在进口前完成——仅凭照明符合性而无 ARCOTEL 核准放行的智能灯具，将不能合法上市。
gap.zht: 兩個司法轄區均要求無線燈具取得無線電核准，但兩套方案相互獨立且不互認：中國 SRRC 核准不被厄瓜多爾 ARCOTEL 認可。對於厄瓜多爾，製造商 / 進口商須：（1）確認無線模組的頻率及發射功率落入厄瓜多爾授權頻段；（2）為設備取得 ARCOTEL 型號核准；（3）另行取得 INEN 照明符合性證書。中國與厄瓜多爾授權頻段或最大功率的差異可能要求模組重新配置或重新檢測。ARCOTEL 流程通常由當地進口商辦理，須在進口前完成——僅憑照明符合性而無 ARCOTEL 核准放行的智能燈具，將不能合法上市。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for wireless models) — ARCOTEL equipment homologation required for smart/wireless LED luminaires before importation, in addition to the INEN lighting Certificate of Conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for wireless models) — SRRC type approval required for the radio module, in addition to CCC for the luminaire

source.publisher: ARCOTEL — Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones (Ecuador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart LED luminaires with wireless functionality require ARCOTEL equipment homologation in Ecuador, separate from and in addition to the INEN lighting Certificate of Conformity. China's SRRC approval is not recognized by ARCOTEL, and authorized bands or power limits may differ, so the radio module may need re-configuration or re-testing. The ARCOTEL filing is typically handled by the in-country importer and must be completed before importation. Confirm the radio module's compliance with Ecuador's authorized spectrum before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备无线功能的智能 LED 灯具在厄瓜多尔须取得 ARCOTEL 设备型号核准，独立于并附加于 INEN 照明符合性证书。中国 SRRC 核准不被 ARCOTEL 认可，且授权频段或功率限值可能不同，故无线模块可能需要重新配置或重新检测。ARCOTEL 申报通常由当地进口商办理，须在进口前完成。出货前请确认无线模块符合厄瓜多尔授权频谱。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備無線功能的智能 LED 燈具在厄瓜多爾須取得 ARCOTEL 設備型號核准，獨立於並附加於 INEN 照明符合性證書。中國 SRRC 核准不被 ARCOTEL 認可，且授權頻段或功率限值可能不同，故無線模組可能需要重新配置或重新檢測。ARCOTEL 申報通常由當地進口商辦理，須在進口前完成。出貨前請確認無線模組符合厄瓜多爾授權頻譜。
